change_summary.title: Adaptive configuration update to core aws infrastructure
change_summary.description: Pipeline-classified adaptive change covering 12 repositories, 46 commits, and 21 files (4 in production paths). Affected services: Core AWS infrastructure, Route53 DNS routing, VPC network fabric, Security group policy, and 8 additional component(s).
